ariaSpec.usage: Specifies the role of the component.
Follows Toolbar spec: sets the component role.
Follows Toolbar spec: each toolbar must have a label specifying its purpose.
Required as the previous navigation button contains only an icon (no text).
Required as the next navigation button contains only an icon (no text).
The new date of the Scheduler view will be announced upon navigation to a new time span or view type.
The <select> element visible on the toolbar on small screens must have its aria-label set.
Follows SegmentedControl spec: sets the proper role for the group of view buttons.
Follows SegmentedControl spec: specifies the current state of the view SegmentedControl. Only the selected button within the group will have this attribute set to true.
The main table of the Agenda view must indicate it is a Data Grid.
The <tbody> element must have its semantics removed.
Inner <table> elements within the Agenda Scheduler must have their semantic role removed.
Must have role explicitly set as it has been removed by the <table> role set (none/presentation).
Must have role explicitly set as it has been removed by the <table> role set (none/presentation).
Must have role explicitly set as it has been removed by the <table> role set (none/presentation).
Used to signify the currently selected row in Agenda view.
Must have role explicitly set as it has been removed by the <table> role set (none/presentation).
Must have role explicitly set as it has been removed by the <table> role set (none/presentation).
All <table> elements within the Scheduler must have their semantic role removed.
Times sidebar tables must have their semantics removed. The role propagates to child th/tr elements, resolving empty-table-header violations.
Indicating that the event element is interactive.
Label containing the title, start, and end date of the appointment.
Scrollable elements need to be focusable to ensure scrolling with arrow keys is available (does not apply to agenda view).

kbSpec.behavior: opens the popup for creation of new appointment
toggles view between business hours and full day (where available)
navigates to the previous time period
navigates to the next time period
navigates to the view with the respective number
move focus through appointments and the `more events` button, then continue to the next appointment in sequence
opens the Edit Popup to modify the appointment
opens the Delete confirmation popup to modify the appointment
If date is focused, opens its Tooltip.
If Tooltip is focused, navigates to Day view displaying the Tooltip date.
If a Tooltip is focused, closes that and returns focus to its target date.
moves focus to the selected (if present), or the first event (if any) in the view
